title: JOY PLUS
description: Adds four new armor sets, a high damage fast swinging Magma Sword, and a craftable Magma Ball item. Designed for SMP progression and late-game variety while keeping the vanilla feel. Fabric loader supported.
body:
![Joy + Explanation2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da2c1df1abef5bd26fbd745f2f46280c77afbff5_0.webp)


## Info ➕
**A small content mod made for my SMP that adds new armor and gear to make progression more interesting and fun. Instead of just rushing to diamond and netherite every world, this mod gives you more things to work toward and mess around with while exploring or fighting other players ⚔️**

**Joy Plus currently runs on the Fabric mod loader! More loader support may be added in the future depending on demand.**

## Features 🛡️
**The Glopatian Armor** is made from emerald blocks mixed with slime, giving it a unique green look and a new step in progression before the usual late-game gear.

**Ocearm armor** uses diamonds and hearts of the sea, so it’s a strong, “treasure of the ocean” style armor that feels special to craft.

**Ancient Chain armor** is basically chainmail, but taken to the extreme. It’s actually stronger than netherite, so it becomes a new late-game goal to aim for.

 And then there’s the **Orpin armor**, which can only be obtained in creative or by server admins. It’s meant for events, rewards, or just cool bragging rights.

The mod also adds a new item called the **Magma Ball**, made from two fire charges and a magma cream. With that, you can craft the** Magma Sword**. **The Magma Sword** hits hard and swings fast, making it a great weapon choice for PVP or boss fights.**


**Joy Plus keeps the vanilla feel of Minecraft, but gives you more to do, more to collect, and more ways to show off in SMP worlds!🔥**

Created by X Mod Team | evolvex
